code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
    let n = parts.len()
    mut result = ""
    mut i = 0
    mut first = true
    while i < n
      match parts.get(i)
      when Some(tok)
        if first
          result = tok
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{tok}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 2
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
